summary:
There is a well-established link between disorders of lipid metabolism and early-onset diabetes due to their shared role in metabolic syndrome. Psoriasis is weakly but plausibly connected to metabolic disturbances, making Option C—the only one with such overlapping pathophysiology—the most supported association.  

\boxed{C}
